title: Extracting a List of Months from a String
scenario: Given a string containing a list of months, generate a Python function that extracts the list of months from the string.
constraints: Must be a single function definition

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated function should use the re module and be a single function definition.
The generated function should have valid syntax and be free of syntax errors.
The generated function should correctly extract the list of months from the string.
